interactions.speaker: Furhat
interactions.text: Hello, and welcome to your weekly check-in for Uppsala University students. I will ask you a few short questions.

interactions.speaker: Furhat
interactions.text: How would you describe your general mood this past week here in Uppsala?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.text: uh my mood has been okay uh the weather in OA is a little bit gray but I'm trying to enjoying the small moment of the sunshine

interactions.speaker: Furhat
interactions.text: I am genuinely glad to hear that you are doing well. It is always encouraging to see positive moments during the week.

interactions.speaker: Furhat
interactions.text: Have you experienced any stress from your university studies or recent deadlines?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.text: uh yes I've been feeling a little bit stressed actually I have a major that line and a group project due to the end of this week

interactions.speaker: Furhat
interactions.text: I completely understand. That sounds like a very challenging situation to navigate, and it is entirely normal to feel that way.

interactions.speaker: Furhat
interactions.text: Now, moving on to the next part.

interactions.speaker: Furhat
interactions.text: How do you feel you have balanced your study time and your personal life over the past few days?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.text: could have been hard to balance everything I spend the most of my time in the library and don't have much time for myself

interactions.speaker: Furhat
interactions.text: I am truly sorry to hear you are feeling that way. Please remember to be kind to yourself during these difficult moments.

interactions.speaker: Furhat
interactions.text: How has your social life or connection with friends been lately? Have you had time for a fika or a chat?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.text: yes

interactions.speaker: Furhat
interactions.text: I see. Could you tell me a little bit more about that?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.text: my social life has been great I had a really nice speaker with my classmate yesterday which was uh really present great

interactions.speaker: Furhat
interactions.text: That is wonderful to hear. Having those good experiences really makes a difference in your overall well-being.

interactions.speaker: Furhat
interactions.text: Let's move to the next question.

interactions.speaker: Furhat
interactions.text: With the dark winter days, how have you been relaxing or taking care of yourself?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.text: I've been relaxing by staying at home lighting some candles and reading books to copy with the darkness outside

interactions.speaker: Furhat
interactions.text: It is great to know things are going well for you. Keep focusing on whatever is bringing you that positive energy.

interactions.speaker: Furhat
interactions.text: How would you describe your energy and rest this week?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.text: to be honest I feel a little bit tired and a little bit exhausted after such a long and busy week at the University

interactions.speaker: Furhat
interactions.text: That sounds really tough. It is completely valid to feel overwhelmed, so make sure you are taking some time just to breathe.

interactions.speaker: Furhat
interactions.text: Moving forward.

interactions.speaker: Furhat
interactions.text: Finally, how would you rate your sleep quality over the past few nights?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.text: my sleep has been fine I usually manage to get about like 7 hours of sleep so I feel relatively well rested

interactions.speaker: Furhat
interactions.text: I am genuinely glad to hear that you are doing well. It is always encouraging to see positive moments during the week.

interactions.speaker: Furhat
interactions.text: Thank you so much for taking the time to complete this check-in. Your participation is highly appreciated. Remember that taking care of your mental well-being is just as important as your studies. I hope you have a wonderful and balanced week ahead. Goodbye!
